summary: Senior Software Developer with 10+ years of experience designing, migrating, and optimizing scalable systems. Expertise in microservices and serverless architectures using AWS, Azure, Python, .NET, and Node.js, PHP. Passionate about clean code implementation and continuous process improvement.
